sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NVIDIA's 13F Bombshell: A New AI Power Trio Emerges
feed.summary: NVIDIA's latest 13F filing reveals its Q4 2025 investment activities, highlighting strategic moves within the AI and semiconductor sectors. The company made Intel and Synopsys its top holdings, indicating a deeper alignment for its x86 CPU ecosystem and chip design processes. NVIDIA also sold its stake in Applied Digital while maintaining positions in other neocloud companies, signaling a more focused portfolio and AI infrastructure priorities.

feed.title: Coca-Cola bottler disputes EEOC claim of sex discrimination over women-only trip
feed.summary: A Coca-Cola bottler, Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast Inc., is disputing a lawsuit filed by the EEOC alleging sex discrimination because the company hosted a women-only networking trip to Mohegan Sun in 2024. The EEOC claims excluding men constitutes a Title VII violation and a sex-based denial of equal compensation, as the women were paid for the event. The company's attorney argues the event fully complied with existing EEOC regulations and that the lawsuit was filed without a full investigation.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) is expected to report significant year-over-year earnings and revenue growth for the quarter ended December 2025, with an estimated EPS of $2.51 and revenues of $5.34 billion. However, despite the positive outlook, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of -48.87% and a Zacks Rank #3 suggest it might not beat consensus EPS estimates. Investors are advised to consider other factors beyond just earnings expectations when evaluating the stock.

feed.title: Travelers, XL Specialty denied appeal in $25.5 million Cigna coverage dispute
feed.summary: Delaware's top court has denied an appeal from Travelers, XL Specialty, and two other insurers, upholding a ruling that a Justice Department demand for information should be treated as a covered insurance claim for Cigna. This decision leaves the insurers facing a $25.5 million coverage dispute regarding Cigna's expenses in responding to a federal investigation into potential False Claims Act violations. The case highlights the increasing complexity of trigger points for professional liability policies in healthcare, especially concerning government investigations.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts See a 57.03% Upside in LiveRamp (RAMP): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
feed.summary: LiveRamp (RAMP) has seen its shares gain 0.4% recently, with Wall Street analysts setting an average short-term price target of $39.43, suggesting a potential 57% upside from its current $25.11. While price targets alone can be misleading, growing optimism among analysts regarding RAMP's earnings prospects, evidenced by upward EPS estimate revisions and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicates a legitimate reason to expect an upside in the stock. Investors are advised to treat price targets with skepticism but consider the positive earnings trend.

feed.title: Expeditors Rose 25% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) stock has risen 25% in the last six months due to stabilizing global freight conditions and improving shipment visibility. Despite this rally, the stock recently experienced a 7.2% intraday drop after Q3 institutional filings showed some large asset managers trimming their positions, though overall institutional ownership remains high. A valuation model suggests limited upside for EXPD by 2026, estimating a target price of $154.98, implying the stock is modestly overvalued under conservative assumptions.

feed.title: Why Is Billionaire Philippe Laffont Buying Sprouts Farmers Market Stock?
feed.summary: Billionaire hedge fund manager Philippe Laffont, known for his tech investments, has recently surprised the market by initiating a position in Sprouts Farmers Market (SFM), a specialty health-food retailer. This move, detailed in a recent 13F filing, comes as Sprouts Farmers Market exhibits solid financial growth, strategic operational strength, and an increasing integration of AI into its business model. Despite its stock being down 14% year-to-date, analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for SFM, projecting a significant upside potential.

feed.title: Dr Reddy's Acquires Progynova, Cyclo-Progynova Brands from Mercury Pharma
feed.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd. has announced the acquisition of the trademarks for Progynova and Cyclo-Progynova, along with related assets, for the Indian market from Mercury Pharma Group Limited. This strategic move marks Dr. Reddy's entry into the hormone replacement therapy segment and strengthens its gynaecology portfolio in India. The brands, particularly Progynova, have a strong market presence with approximately ₹100 crore in sales, indicating a significant step for Dr. Reddy's in expanding its therapeutic offerings.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Sentiment
feed.summary: Deep-pocketed investors are showing mixed sentiment towards Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM), with a significant volume of options activity detected. Benzinga’s options scanner identified 9 extraordinary options activities, with 44% bullish and 33% bearish sentiment. The price targets considered by these investors range from $80.0 to $120.0, and one analyst from DA Davidson maintains a Buy rating with a target price of $125.0.

feed.title: Quanta Services's Options: A Look at What the Big Money is Thinking
feed.summary: Deep-pocketed investors have shown a mixed sentiment towards Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR), with a slight leaning towards bearishness, based on recent options activity. Benzinga's options scanner identified 16 unusual options activities for PWR, indicating significant market interest. Analysts have an average target price of $525.67 for Quanta Services, with recent ratings including an Overweight, a Buy, and a maintained Buy.

feed.title: Corporate Knights names Steel Dynamics global steel sustainability leader
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ: STLD) has been recognized by Corporate Knights as the global leader in the steelmaking industry and named one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations for the second consecutive year. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to safety, innovation, and sustainability, based on Corporate Knights' evaluation of sustainable investments, revenues, and revenue momentum. Mark D. Millett, Co-Founder, Chairman, and CEO, emphasized that this honor reflects the dedication of their teams and drives their pursuit of high operational and financial performance.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Recognized by Corporate Knights as One of the Most Sustainable Corporations in the World
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. has been recognized by Corporate Knights as one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations, leading the steelmaking industry globally. This marks the second consecutive year Steel Dynamics has received this honor, reflecting its commitment to sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence. The assessment by Corporate Knights considered companies with over $1 billion in revenue, evaluating them on sustainable investments, revenues, and revenue momentum.

feed.title: Beach City Coffee Launches Fair Trade Organic Beans in 350+ Kroger Stores
feed.summary: Women-owned coffee brand, Beach City Coffee, has expanded its reach by launching three Fair Trade organic blends in over 350 Kroger stores, including Ralphs, Fry’s, and King Soopers. The company emphasizes its commitment to sustainability through 100% compostable, PFAS-free packaging and sourcing practices that support farmers and community reinvestment. This expansion marks a significant growth milestone and highlights the brand's dedication to making a positive impact through everyday consumer choices.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces Infiniium XR8 Oscilloscopes to Accelerate High-Speed Digital Validation and Compliance
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched its new Infiniium XR8 Real-Time oscilloscopes, designed to enhance high-speed digital and compliance testing. These oscilloscopes feature a new hardware and software architecture with advanced ASIC and digital engine technology, aiming to reduce validation cycles from days to hours. The Infiniium XR8 offers improved signal integrity, faster response times, and a compact design, addressing the challenges of rapidly evolving interface standards and compressed development timelines.

feed.title: How Gartner will help accelerate and scale your AI strategy
feed.summary: Gartner's Application Innovation & Business Solutions Summit 2026 is designed to help enterprise leaders overcome common hurdles in AI strategy implementation, such as cultural change, skills gaps, governance, and architectural issues. The summit offers practical insights and interactive sessions to assist in turning AI visions into reality, focusing on GenAI adoption, application modernization, and cost optimization. Attendees can expect actionable strategies, peer-led discussions, and expert guidance to accelerate and scale their AI initiatives.

feed.title: Germany Considers Additional F-35 Purchase from Lockheed Martin (LMT)
feed.summary: Germany is reportedly considering purchasing over 35 additional F-35 fighter jets from Lockheed Martin, despite official denials, due to challenges with its joint fighter program with France. While Lockheed Martin, a dominant player in aerospace and defense, shows strong revenue growth, it faces declining margins and a high valuation. Investors should be aware of the company's significant leverage and potential overvaluation.

feed.title: Tenaris (NYSE:TS) Shares Gap Up Following Strong Earnings
feed.summary: Tenaris (NYSE:TS) shares gapped up following stronger-than-expected earnings, with the company reporting $0.87 EPS against an estimated $0.76 and revenue of $3 billion. Despite the strong performance, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target significantly below the current trading price. The industrial products company focuses on steel tubular products for the oil and gas industry.

feed.title: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) Reaches New 1-Year High Following Dividend Announcement
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) reached a new 52-week high after announcing a dividend of $0.17 per share, payable on March 25th to shareholders of record on March 4th. The company's stock traded higher, reaching $35.61 with a volume of over 1.5 million shares. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating for HAL with an average price target of $34.95, and the firm recently beat quarterly earnings estimates.

feed.title: Stibbe advises ElevenEs on Series B first closing backed by Caterpillar Venture Capital
feed.summary: Stibbe advised ElevenEs, a battery technology company, on the first closing of its Series B investment round, which received backing from Caterpillar Venture Capital, Inc. and an affiliate of BST HK Ltd. This investment will support ElevenEs' growth strategy, including the construction of a battery manufacturing facility in Subotica, Serbia. Stibbe provided legal support for the transaction's structuring and implementation.

feed.title: How (HYUP) Movements Inform Risk Allocation Models
feed.summary: The article discusses how Xtrackers High Beta High Yield Bond Etf (NASDAQ: HYUP) movements inform risk allocation models, highlighting a neutral sentiment across all time horizons. It presents institutional trading strategies tailored to different risk profiles, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis. The analysis suggests a wait-and-see approach with a favorable risk-reward setup.

feed.title: Rtx Corp stock hits all-time high of 206.51 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Rtx Corp (RTX) stock reached an all-time high of $206.51, reflecting strong investor confidence and robust performance with a 66.36% increase over the past year. The company, an aerospace and defense giant, has maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years and recently secured significant contracts, including a $230.5 million deal for F135 propulsion systems and technology for sharing radio frequencies. Jefferies maintains a Hold rating with a $225 price target, projecting growth for Pratt & Whitney.

feed.title: Here's What the Street is Saying About Amgen Inc. (AMGN)
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) recently experienced a 'Hold' downgrade from Freedom Capital despite a strong Q4 2025 report, with a revised price target of $375 due to fair valuation and looming exclusivity losses. Concurrently, the European Commission approved UPLIZNA® for generalized myasthenia gravis, offering a new treatment option for patients. The company also reported robust financial performance for fiscal Q4 and full-year 2025, with double-digit growth in revenues and EPS.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Stock After the Wildfire Settlement: Value or Value Trap?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has recently reached a multi-billion dollar wildfire settlement, leading to a re-evaluation of its stock by investors. While the settlement addresses a major legal overhang, the article explores whether the company represents a value opportunity or a value trap, contingent on regulatory decisions, interest rates, and future climate risks. The analysis emphasizes Xcel's regulated utility model, its energy transition investments, and the critical factors that will determine its stock performance and classification as a stable income play or a risk-discounted story for US investors.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum jumps as Q4 results beat expectations and 2026 spending outlook surprises
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum's stock (OXY) rose significantly following a stronger-than-expected Q4 2025 earnings report. The company also announced a dividend increase, substantial debt reduction, and a surprisingly low capital expenditure outlook for 2026, which is expected to boost free cash flow. Insider trading, hedge fund activity, congressional trading, and analyst ratings for OXY are also detailed.

feed.title: Applied Materials (AMAT) Is Up 8.7% After Strong Q1 Results And Major AI-Focused Expansion Moves
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) reported strong Q1 2026 results with significant revenue and net income, alongside resolving an export-control matter. The company is heavily investing in AI infrastructure, including new chipmaking tools and a $5 billion R&D center, and projects strong revenue for Q2 2026. These developments reinforce its growth narrative, driven by AI demand and recent customer spending, despite ongoing geopolitical risks related to export controls.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Labor Lawsuit Tests Employment Practices And Investor Risk Outlook
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams is facing a class action lawsuit in California alleging labor law violations, including unpaid wages and denied breaks. This lawsuit introduces new risks for investors, potentially leading to financial liabilities, reputational damage, and operational changes for the company. Despite these challenges, Sherwin-Williams recently extended its credit facility and maintained its dividend, indicating ongoing financial stability while the legal process unfolds.

feed.title: Assessing Prologis (PLD) Valuation After Toxic Gas Verdict And Growing Legal Liabilities
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) is facing increased legal risks and liabilities following a toxic gas verdict at one of its warehouses, potentially impacting its valuation. Despite recent positive share price momentum and a dividend increase, the market is assessing whether these factors, along with a "20% Overvalued" narrative among analysts, fully reflect the company's prospects. The article suggests evaluating the underlying data and risks, including potential challenges from slower leasing and higher vacancy levels, to stress-test the current valuation story.

feed.title: Elliott Pressure On Norwegian Cruise Line Raises Questions On Value And Governance
feed.summary: Elliott Investment Management has acquired a significant stake in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH) and is pushing for leadership and board changes. This activist campaign follows recent executive decisions and aims to address concerns regarding the company's governance and performance. Investors are now closely watching how these potential changes could impact the cruise line's future direction, risk profile, and opportunities.

feed.title: A Look At Motorola Solutions (MSI) Valuation After Strong Q4 Earnings And AI Product Momentum
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions saw a significant stock jump after strong Q4 2025 earnings, driven by double-digit revenue growth and AI-enhanced product momentum. Valued at $451.60, with a fair value estimate of $487.90, the company appears undervalued due to its recurring software and services growth, although a high P/E ratio suggests some valuation risk. Investors are encouraged to consider both the growth potential from smart city technologies and risks such as slower software adoption or new market competitors.

feed.title: Omnicell trying to close in on key technical measure
feed.summary: This article states that Omnicell is approaching a key technical measure. Without further content, specific details about this measure or Omnicell's performance cannot be provided. The article suggests an imminent development regarding OMN's stock.

feed.title: Ocular Therapeutix Shareholders Are Encouraged to Reach Out to Johnson Fistel for More Information About Potentially Recovering Their Losses
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of investors of Ocular Therapeutix, Inc. (OCUL) whose stock declined approximately 27% after the company announced topline results from its SOL-1 Phase 3 trial. The firm is examining whether Ocular complied with federal securities laws following the disclosure that patients maintained vision at varying percentages over 9 and 12 months, and approximately 69% were rescue-free at 52 weeks. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to contact Johnson Fistel for more information about potentially recovering their investment losses.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts See Devon Energy (DVN) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
feed.summary: The article discusses whether investors should consider Devon Energy (DVN) based on Wall Street analyst recommendations. While DVN has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) suggesting a "Strong Buy" to "Buy," the author cautions against relying solely on these ratings due to potential bias. Instead, it suggests validating such recommendations with the proprietary Zacks Rank, which points to a "Sell" for DVN, indicating potential near-term stock price decline.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Think Cisco (CSCO) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Cisco (CSCO) stock based on Wall Street analyst recommendations and the proprietary Zacks Rank system. While Cisco has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) suggesting a "Buy," the article cautions that ABRs can be biased due to brokerage firms' vested interests. It highlights the Zacks Rank as a more reliable indicator, which currently rates Cisco as a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) due to positive earnings estimate revisions, suggesting it could be a good investment.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Financial Companies: Capital One Financial (COF) and Canaccord Genuity (OtherCCORF)
feed.summary: Two financial companies, Capital One Financial (COF) and Canaccord Genuity (CCORF), have received bullish sentiments from analysts. John Hecht from Jefferies maintained a Buy rating on Capital One Financial with a $300.00 price target, highlighting a strong buy consensus and a 35.3% upside. Similarly, TD Cowen analyst Graham Ryding reiterated a Buy rating on Canaccord Genuity with a C$16.00 price target, noting a moderate buy consensus and a 22.1% upside.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Raises Price Target for Global Payments (GPN) to $105
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Global Payments (GPN) to $105 from $103, maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This positive adjustment by analyst Jason Kupferberg indicates confidence in the company's growth potential. Although other analysts have shown mixed sentiment with varying price targets, the average target among 26 analysts sits at $101.36, suggesting a 26.12% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison earnings on deck after rate case approval By Investing.com
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (ED) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings after state regulators approved a three-year rate plan. Analysts anticipate adjusted earnings of $0.85 per share on revenue of $3.71 billion, reflecting a decline in earnings year-over-year but a slight increase in revenue. The utility faces challenges balancing infrastructure spending with affordability concerns, and its ability to maintain its dividend growth streak will be a key focus for investors.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison earnings on deck after rate case approval
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (Con Ed) is set to release its fourth-quarter earnings following the approval of a three-year rate plan. While this provides regulatory clarity through 2028, analysts are cautious due to the lower-than-proposed rate increases and significant affordability concerns among customers, which could impact the utility's ability to balance infrastructure spending and maintain its dividend growth streak. Investors will be observing earnings per share and revenue, comments on grid reliability, and the implications of New York's political environment on the utility's financial performance.

feed.title: PODD Q4 Deep Dive: Type 2 Diabetes Expansion and Innovation Drive Outperformance
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, outperforming revenue expectations with a 31.2% year-on-year sales increase. The company's success is largely attributed to record new customer starts, particularly in type 2 diabetes management and international market expansion, driven by the Omnipod system. Insulet anticipates continued growth through further penetration of automated insulin delivery systems and ongoing product innovation, despite facing tougher year-over-year comparisons.

feed.title: Paycom Software (PAYC) Appoints Shane Hadlock as New President
feed.summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) has appointed Shane Hadlock as its new President and Chief Client Officer, effective February 18, 2026. Hadlock, who has been with Paycom for nearly 14 years and possesses over 30 years of technology experience, will now serve as the company's sole principal operating officer. This strategic leadership change aims to strengthen Paycom's executive team and align with market demands, with Chad Richison continuing as CEO and Chairman.

feed.title: SABR Q4 Deep Dive: AI Partnerships and Distribution Gains Shape Outlook
feed.summary: Sabre (SABR) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, exceeding revenue expectations and showing an 80% beat on non-GAAP loss per share. The company's positive trajectory is attributed to gains in travel distribution share, expansion of its multi-source content platform, and growth in hotel distribution and payments. Sabre is also making significant strides in agentic AI initiatives and strategic partnerships, which are expected to drive future revenue streams and solidify its competitive position in the travel technology sector.

feed.title: Allegion at Barclays Conference: Strategic Growth and Challenges
feed.summary: Allegion PLC presented its strategic outlook at the Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial Select Conference, emphasizing strong non-residential growth and innovative electronic solutions, while acknowledging challenges in the residential sector. The company plans strategic acquisitions, particularly in electronics, and aims for international market expansion, leveraging connected lock data for new services. Allegion anticipates continued organic growth in non-residential markets and double-digit growth in electronics, with a focus on profitability and margin expansion despite expected softness in the residential market.

feed.title: Oracle, Deere among market cap stock movers on Thursday By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article highlights significant stock movers across various market capitalization tiers on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Oracle and Deere & Co are among the companies experiencing notable movements, with detailed breakdowns of mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks, including reasons for their performance such as earnings reports, upgrades, and leadership changes. The article notes that these insights are generated with AI support and reviewed by an editor.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact The Gross Law Firm Before April 20, 2026 to Discuss Your Rights - PYPL – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a notice to shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) inviting them to contact the firm regarding potential lead plaintiff appointment in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal provided investors with materially false and misleading statements concerning its financial targets and growth potential for its Branded Checkout segment. This announcement follows a significant stock price drop after PayPal revealed disappointing Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 earnings, withdrew 2027 financial targets, and announced a CEO transition.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact The Gross Law Firm Before April 20, 2026 to Discuss Your Rights - PYPL
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a notice to shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) regarding a class-action lawsuit alleging securities law violations. The lawsuit claims that PayPal provided misleading financial targets and concealed issues with its salesforce's ability to execute growth strategies. Following disappointing Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 results, a CEO transition, and the withdrawal of 2027 financial targets, PayPal's stock price dropped significantly. Shareholders who purchased shares between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss lead plaintiff appointment.

feed.title: CF Industries stock hits 52-week high at $104.49
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CF) stock reached a 52-week high of $104.49, reflecting a 29.79% increase over the past year and a 24.56% year-to-date return. The company maintains a 2.09% dividend yield for 22 consecutive years and possesses strong financial health, despite being considered slightly overvalued. Recent developments include a quarterly dividend announcement, a pilot project for low-carbon fertilizer, and an analyst downgrade due to concerns about normalizing fertilizer prices, offering investors varied perspectives on its future.

feed.title: AbbVie declares quarterly dividend of $1.73 per share
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.73 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 15, 2026. This translates to an annual payout of $6.92 per share, with a current yield of approximately 3.03%. The company, part of the S&P Dividend Aristocrats Index, has increased its dividend by over 330% since its founding in 2013, following strong financial results for Q4 2025 and a credit rating upgrade by Moody's Ratings.

feed.title: Genesis Energy LP stock hits 52-week high at 17.9 USD
feed.summary: Genesis Energy LP's stock reached a 52-week high of $17.9, showing a 50.4% total return over the past year and maintaining dividend payments for 30 consecutive years with a 4.07% yield. Despite this strong performance and investor sentiment, InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock might be overvalued, burdened by over $3 billion in debt, and has not been profitable in the last twelve months. The company recently missed Q4 2025 earnings expectations and is engaged in financial maneuvers, including expanding a cash tender offer and an upsized public offering of senior notes.

feed.title: What Does the Street Have to Say About Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMY)?
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMY) has partnered with Life Science Cares to combat food insecurity, investing $30 million and aiming for 30,000 volunteer hours by 2030. Despite a reiterated Hold rating from Bernstein and an Underweight rating from Morgan Stanley, the company reported a 1% growth in fiscal Q4 2025 revenue and significant increases in growth portfolio revenue. BMY's strong financial performance and its role as a biopharmaceutical company in various therapeutic areas are highlighted.

feed.title: Mativ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:MATV) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.10
feed.summary: Mativ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:MATV) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share, payable on March 27th to shareholders of record as of March 13th. This represents an annualized dividend yield of 2.9% and is covered by the company's earnings, with analysts forecasting a future payout ratio of 28.6%. The company recently beat its earnings per share estimates for the last quarter.

feed.title: Adam Goldstein Backs Changes at Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings
feed.summary: Adam Goldstein, former Royal Caribbean International president and CEO, has confirmed his collaboration with Elliott Investment Management to advocate for changes to Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings' board. In a Fortune opinion piece, Goldstein expressed his belief that Norwegian possesses industry-leading assets but has lagged financially compared to its peers. He emphasized that if appointed to the board, he would serve all shareholders and stakeholders, focusing on disciplined execution to restore Norwegian to a leadership position.
